@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor("async await verify minimal")
C: async_await ∧ one_next(err) ∧ same_order
P: promisify(db.findUser) → await(audit.log) → await(cache.set) → "ok(next(null,user))"
V: "user not found -> next(err)" ∧ "user found and cached -> next(null,user)"
R: ! "race condition" ∧ ! "cache invalidation"
A: same_order

[AUDIT]
Refactor "async await verify minimal" to async/await with minimal behavior change, preserve async/await, single next(err) path, and verify the single next(err) path.
